query:
UPDATE players p
SET 
  completedCycles = COALESCE((
    SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cycle_history ch 
    WHERE ch.userId = p.userId
  ), 0),
  totalPuzzles = COALESCE((
    SELECT SUM(totalPuzzles) FROM cycle_history ch 
    WHERE ch.userId = p.userId
  ), 0),
  totalCorrect = COALESCE((
    SELECT SUM(correctCount) FROM cycle_history ch 
    WHERE ch.userId = p.userId
  ), 0),
  totalTimeMs = COALESCE((
    SELECT SUM(totalTimeMs) FROM cycle_history ch 
    WHERE ch.userId = p.userId
  ), 0)
WHERE p.userId IS NOT NULL;

    WHERE ch.userId = p.userId
  ), 0),
  totalPuzzles = COALESCE((

  totalCorrect = COALESCE((

  totalTimeMs = COALESCE((
    SELECT SUM(totalTimeMs) FROM cycle_history ch

  ), 0)
WHERE p.userId IS NOT NULL;
